headline: Congresswoman denies staff used AI to write defense funding amendment
summary: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna denies her staff used AI to draft a defense funding amendment. She claims AI was only for 'spellcheck' on the amendment summary. This response came after screenshots circulated on X suggesting AI use.

headline: GTA VI is a worrying sign for the future of physical games
summary: Grand Theft Auto VI will cost $79.99 and launches November 19th. Physical versions will only include a download code, not a disc. This move raises concerns about the future of physical game media.

headline: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
summary: Amazon's Prime Day features record-low deals on Apple products. The Apple Watch Series 11 and AirPods Pro 3 are heavily discounted. It's an excellent opportunity to grab wireless earbuds or a smartwatch.

headline: Google is finally opening the Play Store to outside payments
summary: Google will allow alternative billing options in the Play Store globally. This change is part of a settlement in Epic's antitrust lawsuit. Developers can now avoid Google's standard 30% fee.

headline: Some Retailers Are Refusing to Sell GTA 6 Due to the Lack of a Disc
summary: Several retailers are boycotting Grand Theft Auto 6 sales. Their refusal is due to the game's lack of a physical disc. This highlights growing tensions over digital-only releases.

headline: Christopher Nolan Movies Are Hitting All-Time Low Prices in Amazon's Prime Day Sales
summary: Christopher Nolan's 4K movies are at their lowest prices ever. Amazon's Prime Day offers significant discounts on these titles. It's a prime opportunity for 4K setup owners to expand their collection.

headline: GTA 6 Fans Think They Spotted a Lore Mistake, but It's Likely on Purpose
summary: GTA 6 fans believe they've found a lore inconsistency. Rockstar Games may have intentionally included the 'mistake.' The perceived error could be a deliberate narrative choice.

headline: Save Over 50% Off the Renewable Jackery Solar Generator 1000 V2 Power Station Bundle for Prime Day
summary: The Jackery Solar Generator 1000 V2 bundle is over 50% off. An additional $150 discount is available on top of Prime Day pricing. A significant saving on a renewable power station for Prime Day.

headline: Why this heatwave feels worse than the last one
summary: The current heatwave is perceived as more uncomfortable than previous ones. Several factors contribute to its increased severity. Experts explain the reasons behind the heightened discomfort.

headline: Babies and mothers died after 'systemic and sustained' failings, largest NHS maternity review finds
summary: A major NHS maternity review found 'systemic and sustained' failings. These failings led to the deaths of babies and mothers. A 'bullying and toxic culture' was also uncovered within services.

headline: 'From excitement to emptiness': Families affected by largest NHS maternity scandal tell their stories
summary: Families share harrowing stories from the NHS maternity scandal. Their experiences reveal deep emotional impact, from hope to despair. The scandal represents the biggest in NHS history, affecting numerous families.

headline: King meets women's cricket team that is not allowed to exist
summary: King Charles met with the Afghan women's cricket team. The team is currently barred from playing official games. The meeting signifies royal support despite their enforced inactivity.
